MR. HOLLEY'S OPPOSITION IS DUE ONE WEEK FROM THIS DAY. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFFS MELISSA JAQUISH, JENNIFER RIATE, HEATHER BERNARD, ANITA ZIEGLER, ALEX HAWES, HECTOR OSUNA, BRYAN STILLMAN AND DANIEL BACON'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. EOS RESTAURANT IS A CORPORATION AND NEEDS TO HAVE AN ATTORNEY TO REPRESENT THAT CORPORATION, MR. HOLLEY CAN ONLY REPRESENT HIMSELF AS PRO PER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Albert G. Stoll, Esq., (did not leave a card or slip), for plaintiff and moving party
Scott Holley, 415-244-8454, defendant and opposing party in Pro Per

Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFFS MELISSA JAQUISH, JENNIFER RIATE, HEATHER BERNARD, ANITA ZIEGLER, ALEX HAWES, HECTOR OSUNA, BRYAN STILLMAN AND DANIEL BACON'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. Granted. No opposition filed.
EOS Restaurant is a corporation and needs to have an attorney to represent that corporation, Mr. Holley can only represent himself as Pro Per. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2012 Continued To Mar-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jessica Juarez, Esq., of the Albert G. Stoll, Jr. Law Corporation, Tel. 415.576.1500, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
Scott Holley, Tel. 415.244.8454, Defendant appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS MELISSA JAQUISH, JENNIFER RIATE, HEATHER BERNARD, ANITA ZIEGLER, ALEX HAWES, HECTOR OSUNA, BRYAN STILLMAN and DANIEL BACON'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT EOS RESTAURANT'S ANSWER is continued to Mar. 9, 2012 for the defendant to file his opposition papers. Mr. Holley's opposition is due one week from this day. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Not reported.
